# terrible_community_general_packet_volume_attachment (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `project_id` (String) UUID of the project to which the device and volume belong.
- `volume` (String) Selector for the volume. It can be a UUID, an API-generated volume name, or user-defined description string. Example values: `4a347482-b546-4f67-8300-fb5018ef0c5`, `volume-4a347482`, `my volume`.

### Optional

- `auth_token` (String) Packet API token. You can also supply it in environment variable `PACKET_API_TOKEN`.
- `device` (String) Selector for the device. It can be a UUID of the device, or a hostname. Example values: 98a14f7a-3d27-4478-b7cf-35b5670523f3, "my device".
- `state` (String) Indicate desired state of the attachment.

### Read-Only

- `device_id` (String) UUID of device addressed by the module call.
- `volume_id` (String) UUID of volume addressed by the module call.
